H

hashCode() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Coordinate
Computes the hash code for efficient map/set operations.
hasSavedGame() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Checks if a valid binary save file exists on disk.
hasShip() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Cell
Checks whether this cell is occupied by a ship.
hit() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.ShotMarkView
Creates a visual marker for a successful shot hit on a vessel cell (a red diagonal X).
HIT - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.CellState
Cell was targeted and hit a ship segment.
HORIZONTAL - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.Orientation
Ship is positioned horizontally along columns in the same row.
hull() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Gradients
Creates a vertical metallic linear gradient for standard vessel hulls.
HULL - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Base mid-tone color for main ship hull surfaces.
HULL_DARK - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Shading color for lower hull boundaries and recessed structural areas.
HULL_LIGHT - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Highlighting color for top-facing hull boundaries and light reflections.
HULL_SHADOW - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Deep shadow tone for bottom hull contours and occlusion effects.
HumanPlayer - Class in com.example.battleship.model.players
Represents the human player in the Battleship game.
HumanPlayer() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.players.HumanPlayer
 
humanShoot(Coordinate) - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameManager
Executes a shot targeted by the human player onto the machine's board.
HUNT - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.ShootingMode
Search mode where the AI picks random or strategic candidate coordinates.
HuntTargetStrategy - Class in com.example.battleship.model
Implements the Hunt-and-Target AI shooting strategy for Battleship.
HuntTargetStrategy() - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.HuntTargetStrategy
Constructs a new HuntTargetStrategy starting in ShootingMode.HUNT mode.
